benefits.description: improved depth perception, reduced word-finding difficulties, sharper mind, quicker wit
restored joy and fulfillment from hobbies, reduction in depression and emotional dysregulation, restored calm and control
improved focus and attention, ability to concentrate without Adderall-like side effects
improved executive function including planning, bill payment, procrastination reduction
reduced internal mental noise, improved impulse control
restoration of sensory perception and emotional nostalgia

protocol_notes: User sourced peptides from integrativepeptides.com, recommended by integrative functional medicine doctor. Also undergoing hormone replacement therapy, IASIS neurofeedback therapy, IV supplementation, chiropractic care, and cognitive behavioral therapy. Injury occurred in 2006 (hydroplane accident at 60 mph). Treatment started over a month prior to post date (April 2021). Product referenced as 'CerebroPep' described as similar to Cerebrolysin.
